text:
Contaminated Fuel - Avoid This Petrol Pump!

Had a terrible experience at this petrol pump. Filled up my scooty, and soon it started jerking and losing power. Clearly, the petrol provided here is not pure. Lost trust and money. Wouldn't recommend this pump to anyone. Ensure your vehicle's health elsewhere! 🚫⛽️
